g.text: Model-predicted intervals should include observed data points

polygon.style: stroke-width: 0.00; stroke: none; stroke-linecap: butt; fill: #999999; fill-opacity: 0.40;

g.text: Observed residual variance (green) should follow predicted residual variance (blue)

polygon.style: stroke-width: 0.00; stroke: none; stroke-linecap: butt; fill: #999999; fill-opacity: 0.20;

g.text: Reference line should be flat and horizontal
Points should be inside the contour lines

g.text: Dots should fall along the line
